news.title: AKP Sözcüsü Çelik: Seçimde cumhurbaşkanı adayımız Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
news.summary: AKP Sözcüsü Ömer Çelik, partisinin bir sonraki seçimde cumhurbaşkanı adayının Recep Tayyip Erdoğan olduğunu açıkladı.

news.title: 'İran nükleer denetçilere izin verdi, ABD petrol yaptırımını kaldırdı'
news.summary: ABD Başkan Yardımcısı JD Vance, İran'ın nükleer denetçilerin ülkeye geri dönmesine izin verdiğini söylerken ABD Hazinesi de İran'ın petrol ve petrol ürünlerine yönelik yaptırımlarım 21 Ağustos'a kadar askıya alındığını açıkladı.

news.title: Haymana Belediye Başkanı Levent Koç CHP'den istifa etti, aynı gün AKP'ye katıldı
news.summary: CHP'li Haymana Belediye Başkanı Levent Koç partisinden istifa ettiği aynı gün AKP'ye katıldı. Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, Koç'un rozetini 'AKP Ankara Teşkilat Buluşması' sonrasında taktı.

news.title: Seferihisar Belediyesine rüşvet operasyonu. İmar Müdürü gözaltına alındı
news.summary: Seferihisar Belediyesine yönelik rüşvet operasyonunda İmar ve Şehircilik Müdürü E.U. gözaltına alındı.

news.title: Ankara’da NATO tedbirleri. 13 günlük eylem yasağı ilan edildi
news.summary: Ankara’da 7-8 Temmuz 2026 tarihlerinde düzenlenecek 36. NATO Zirvesi öncesi kent genelinde 13 günlük eylem yasağı ilan edildi. Yasak, 28 Haziran saat 00.00’dan 10 Temmuz saat 23.59’a kadar sürecek.

news.title: 3 yıl önce kayıtlara ‘intihar vakası’ olarak geçen Türkan’ın ölümüyle ilgili 2 tutuklama
news.summary: İçişleri Bakanlığı, Şanlıurfa'nın Viranşehir ilçesinde 2023'te Türkan K'nin intihar olarak değerlendirilen ölümüne ilişkin dosyanın yeniden ele alınması üzerine 2 şüphelinin tutuklandığını bildirdi.

news.title: Gaziantep Havalimanı'na iniş yapan yolcu uçağının lastiği patladı
news.summary: Stuttgart-Gaziantep seferini yapan yolcu uçağının Gaziantep Havalimanı'na inişinin ardından lastiğinin patladığı, uçaktaki 186 yolcu ve 6 mürettebatın güvenli şekilde tahliye edildiği bildirildi.

news.title: Vance says Iran will allow nuclear inspectors back into the country
news.summary: The US vice-president says a great deal of progress has been made after the first round of talks between the US and Iran.

news.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
news.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.

news.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
news.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.

news.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
news.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.

news.title: Clive Davis, music mogul behind Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies aged 94
news.summary: The record company executive also worked with Billy Joel, Pink Floyd, Alicia Keys and Aerosmith.

news.title: Red heat alerts issued in France, Italy and Spain as 40C temperatures forecast
news.summary: The heatwave conditions are forecast to intensify in the coming days across central and western Europe.

news.title: Belgium’s Doku welcomes son during World Cup amid commentator controversy
news.summary: Doku travelled while French presenter who said fathers are 'useless' at childbirth was stood down from her show.

news.title: Egypt denied flight to Seattle ahead of final World Cup group match
news.summary: Egypt's team will return to their training base in Spokane, about 450km east of Seattle, after rejected flight.

news.title: US House committee reaches bipartisan deal on social media rules for kids
news.summary: Committee leaders did not release details but said the legislation would 'hold Big Tech accountable'.

news.title: ‘Stop genocide’: Activist stopped by police at Tokyo’s Israeli Embassy
news.summary: An activist in Japan was surrounded by police after he approached the Israeli Embassy in Tokyo on Monday and shouted.

news.title: Hungary’s PM launches drive to free country from Orban’s ‘mafia’
news.summary: The raft of proposed changes includes a new constitution and anti-corruption office, and the ousting of the president.

news.title: Czech public media staff strike, citing government threat to independence
news.summary: Plan to put funding under direct control has sparked widespread opposition, with critics fearing political interference.

news.title: A federal judge finds a Trump data system to verify voters is unlawful
news.summary: Tens of millions of voters have had their data run through the Trump administration's revamped SAVE tool. A judge just found it unlawful.

news.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Texas man's intellectual disability case in capital case
news.summary: The court's action means Victor Saldaño is likely to be executed even though both defense and state experts determined he was not eligible for execution under the law.

news.title: Magnificent Messi makes history, breaks all-time World Cup scoring record
news.summary: Messi scored a record-setting 17th World Cup goal in Argentina's game against Austria. And, then, he netted another goal, making him the all-time leader in World Cup tournaments (men and women).

news.title: Did you know? Alan Greenspan and Ayn Rand were close friends
news.summary: One of the most intellectually important relationships in the life of the late Fed chair Alan Greenspan was with his close friend, the formidable novelist and libertarian thinker Ayn Rand.

news.title: 2 students in custody after shooting at high school in Philippines kills 3
news.summary: An investigation is underway to determine the cause. Police said the suspects claimed they were bullied at school.

news.title: Supreme Court allows a ruling that ends a tool to protect minority voters in 7 states
news.summary: The Supreme Court has left in place a ruling that strikes down a key tool for enforcing Voting Rights Act protections for voters with a disability or an inability to read or write in seven states.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
